- [x] Verify that the copilot-instructions.md file in the .github directory is created.
- [x] Clarify Project Requirements
- [x] Scaffold the Project
- [x] Customize the Project
- [x] Install Required Extensions
- [x] Compile the Project
- [x] Create and Run Task
- [x] Launch the Project
- [x] Ensure Documentation is Complete

Execution Guidelines
- Use available todo tracking tools; read status before starting a new step; mark completion with short notes.
- Keep communication concise; note skipped steps briefly.
- Use "." as the working directory; avoid unnecessary media or links; follow any project setup rules provided.
- Create new folders only when requested (except .vscode/tasks).
- Install only extensions returned by get_project_setup_info.
- If details are missing, assume a Hello World starting point and clarify with the user.
- Generated components should serve a clear purpose; ask when in doubt.
- Task is complete when the project builds cleanly, README is current, and launch guidance is provided.
